title: Salty Velvety Cheese Stir-fry
description: A show-off Japanese dish featuring vegan V Sterbottensost cheese in a salty, velvety stir-fry that combines the best of Eastern and Western flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and shallots, sautéing for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add sliced green onions to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
In a small bowl, mix together rice vinegar and tamari soy sauce. Pour this mixture into the wok or frying pan with the ingredients, stirring well to combine all components.
Gradually add water and wheat starch (cornstarch) to create a creamy sauce. Cook until thickened and smooth.
Gently fold in V Sterbottensost Vegan Cheese, ensuring it melts completely and coats evenly throughout the stir-fry mixture.
Serve hot as a side dish or over cooked rice for a delicious vegan meal.
